description: Single source of truth for all AI matching behavior. Replicated to every console via PouchDB/CouchDB. Both the offline rules engine and the online LLM read from this doc, so they never drift. Edit here, applies everywhere, no redeploy.

adjacency._note: Adjacent age bands earn partial age credit. Same band = full age weight; adjacent = half (engine rounds down).

cluster._note: Mode C HOTSPOT: a zone with >= minOpenCases open cases within radiusMeters of a Traffic-choke-point = HIGH danger. When clusters tie, prefer the nearest chokepoint with higher risk_level (see riskPriority). Surfaced top-5 for the ICCC map.

escalation._note: Auto-flag for police: child < childAgeMax separated > childHours; UNRESOLVED case older than unresolvedHours; >= dupReports matching the same found person (trafficking concern).

returnRules._note: Never return a match below minReturnScore. Modes A/B return topN; Mode C returns topNHotspots.

llm._note: Swappable. Set backend to 'local' in future to route the same calls through an on-box LLM with zero other changes. When unreachable (offline), the rules engine scores everything except the 'description' (semantic) points and tags them 'semantic pending'.

voice._note: Deepgram Voice Agent intake (online-only enhancement). LISTEN: nova-3 with language 'multi' hears Hindi/Marathi/English code-switching (the hard part — a panicked family). THINK: Claude (Deepgram-managed id: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 / claude-3-5-haiku-latest; opus is NOT Deepgram-hosted, so the match/explain path uses claude-opus-4-8 directly while voice think uses Sonnet). SPEAK: Aura has NO Hindi/Marathi TTS and 'multi' TTS needs ElevenLabs/OpenAI — so the agent SPEAKS English back to the operator (who relays to the family); it still UNDERSTANDS the family's language and captures verbatim Hindi terms in submit_case. To voice the family's own language, switch speak to an eleven_labs/open_ai provider. Structured submit_case output feeds the deterministic engine. Prompt + schema live in config:voiceAgent. Offline → typed form + Whisper.cpp box.
